title: hieracium kemulariae
side_effects: Hieracium kemulariae can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. In some cases, consuming the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or essential oils can also lead to skin irritation, including redness, itching, and blistering. Improper use of Hieracium kemulariae can also interfere with certain medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes.
